control_plane_effect: breakLease rotates lineage fence and opens StaleOwnershipRecoveryRecord

trigger: release followed by stale client retry

expected_result: stale retry fails closed on tuple drift

trigger: supervisor explicitly reacquires after stale owner

domain_effect: takeOverStaleTask reassigns owner and clears stale recovery ref
expected_result: new owner gains exclusive mutation authority

trigger: old owner attempts another action after takeover
control_plane_effect: registerCommandAction rejects stale tuple and keeps takeover lease current
append_only_artifacts: stale_ownership_recovery_record remains traceable; prior takeover record preserved
expected_result: fail closed with stale write recovery path

trigger: active review shell exists during takeover
domain_effect: takeOverStaleTask supersedes the prior ReviewSession instead of reusing it
expected_result: new owner never inherits a silently live review session
